ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the clothing item belongs to */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the clothing item belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the clothing item belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the clothing item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the clothing item's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item the size chart belongs to */,
  "body_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the body type the size chart is designed for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_body_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_type_id") REFERENCES body_types ("body_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_types" (
  "body_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body type */,
  "body_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the body type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the body type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the measurement (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL, 2XL) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement (e.g., 91, 94, 97) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., Bust, Waist, Hip) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., designer, product manager, customer service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the clothing item */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the clothing item was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)
